phase8b_result.decision: Stop entry-variant grinding; use Phase 8B evidence to design pre-entry no-trade/session-selection filters before spending more MGC compute.

top_failure_categories.interpretation: Intrabar uncertainty remains a research blocker, not a tuning problem.
Loss path breaches strict risk limits before any payout/promotion case is credible.
PnL is too dependent on one day/trade; require distribution filters before promotion.
Validation/holdout weakness means the signal is not stable enough for promotion.
Costs/stress erase the apparent edge; fewer higher-quality trades are needed.
